name: You Shall Go Out With Joy
title: Dahlia: You Shall Go Out With Joy
in_play_description: When your Dahlia, who has this card equipped, is on the field, and your character is defeated: If you have Favonian Favor on the field, consume all Favonian Favor to ensure the character Immunity to Defeat, and heal them to 2 HP.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Dahlia to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Combat Action: When your active character is Dahlia, equip this card.
After Dahlia equips this card, immediately use Radiant Psalter once.
When your Dahlia, who has this card equipped, is on the field, and your character is defeated: If you have Favonian Favor on the field, consume all Favonian Favor to ensure the character Immunity to Defeat, and heal them to 2 HP.
(You must have Dahlia in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
